understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to complete each KA59 level by placing all selectable pieces onto the goal tiles marked '+' at the same time; a level only reports WIN when every goal is occupied simultaneously, and finishing the final level wins the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece by one grid cell (3 pixels) per action, unless blocked by walls/boundaries or other blocking objects; some adjacent objects may be pushable and move along if pushed. Levels can contain multiple selectables, and CLICK with an exact object pixel coordinate switches control to the selectable at that position; blocked hints are only heuristic and movement can still sometimes succeed or fail depending on the actual collision behavior.

history.summary: Turn 1: MOVE_RIGHT | Test whether the adjacent wall truly blocks movement; moving right is the first step toward the goal region.
history.reasoning: Test whether the adjacent wall truly blocks movement; moving right is the first step toward the goal region.

history.summary: Turn 2: MOVE_RIGHT | Even though movement is flagged blocked by a wall, walls sometimes have nonstandard behavior (e.g., sliding/teleport/wrap); test MOVE_RIGHT to probe interaction.
history.reasoning: Even though movement is flagged blocked by a wall, walls sometimes have nonstandard behavior (e.g., sliding/teleport/wrap); test MOVE_RIGHT to probe interaction.

history.summary: Turn 3: MOVE_RIGHT | Try pushing the adjacent selectable to the right; this may shift it (or reveal special behavior when blocked by the wall).
history.reasoning: Try pushing the adjacent selectable to the right; this may shift it (or reveal special behavior when blocked by the wall).

history.summary: Turn 4: CLICK | The current selectable at [15,21] is fully blocked, so switch control to the other selectable that can potentially reach the goal area.
history.reasoning: The current selectable at [15,21] is fully blocked, so switch control to the other selectable that can potentially reach the goal area.

history.summary: Turn 5: MOVE_LEFT | Test whether the adjacent inner wall can be pushed left to open a path toward the other selectable and/or goals.
history.reasoning: Test whether the adjacent inner wall can be pushed left to open a path toward the other selectable and/or goals.

history.summary: Turn 6: MOVE_RIGHT | Try moving right into the adjacent goal area; the goal itself may be non-collidable despite the blocked hint.
history.reasoning: Try moving right into the adjacent goal area; the goal itself may be non-collidable despite the blocked hint.

history.summary: Turn 7: MOVE_RIGHT | Try moving the right selectable onto the adjacent goal tile region to start satisfying the goal condition.
history.reasoning: Try moving the right selectable onto the adjacent goal tile region to start satisfying the goal condition.

history.summary: Turn 8: MOVE_UP | Move the selected piece onto the goal region (it’s directly above) to satisfy the goal-occupancy win condition.
history.reasoning: Move the selected piece onto the goal region (it’s directly above) to satisfy the goal-occupancy win condition.
